title: calamagrostis forsteri
intro: Calamagrostis forsteri, also known as Forster's fescue, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Calamagrostis forsteri can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
